title: Transforming pJC8 into HB101

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6uu15","text":"Mix and Go E. coli Transformation Kit (Zymo Research, T3001/T3002)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bavir","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1seic","text":"Contents of SOB medium:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"135ke","text":"20g Bacto Tryptone","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cbn2r","text":"5g Yeast Extract","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8jfbe","text":"0.58g Sodium Chloride","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1n1am","text":"0.19g Potassium Chloride","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3q1k8","text":"1L sterile H20","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"enu3v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare tetracycline LB agar plates Making tetracycline LB agar plates by Bonnie Evans
Warm plates in 37 °C incubator Chilled plates will decrease Mix & Go cell transformation efficiency.
Get SOB medium and 20 % glucose from media kitchen
Add 2 mL 20 % glucose to 100 ml SOB medium
Isolate pJC8 cosmid from E. coli DH5α Qiagen QIAprep Spin Miniprep for cosmids from metagenomic library by Bonnie Evans
Thaw 100 uL aliquot of E. coli HB101 Mix & Go competent cells on ice
Mix by tapping the tube and shaking downwards once
Incubate at 37 °C with shaking at 200 rpm for 1 hour An outgrowth in SOC medium is required for efficient transformation when selecting with tetracycline.
Pipette all (505 uL) of the transformation mix onto a tetracycline LB agar plate and spread using plating beads.
Dry under laminar flow for a few minutes
Incubate plate at 37 °C overnight If the transformation is successful, you will have individual colonies.
creator: Bonnie Evans
